metaDescription: Magistral 1.1 (Small & Medium) (Mistral AI), released 2025-07 — part of the Magistral line. Second iteration of the reasoning models.
overview: Magistral 1.1 (Small & Medium) is a large language model from Mistral AI, part of the Magistral line. Released 2025-07. Chain-of-thought reasoning line in open Small and premier Medium sizes.
What's notable in this version: Second iteration of the reasoning models.
